rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not generate assumptions or guarantees that reference opaque Boolean data as integers.
Do not assume that AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
